title: GEEPAS Steam Iron | Clothes Dry & Steam Press | 35s Fast Heat-Up, Vertical Steaming | Ceramic Soleplate & Adjustable Temperature | 480ml Water Tank 0.9g/Steam Output | 2 Year Warranty 3000W Purple
features: ✅ POWERFUL 3000W PERFORMANCE, FAST HEAT-UP – The Geepas Steam irons deliver quick 35 seconds heat-up and efficient ironing. It ensures faster crease removal, making ironing effortless and saving time on busy mornings.

✅ CERAMIC SOLEPLATE – The flat iron is equipped with a ceramic soleplate, iron steamer glides seamlessly over all fabric types without snagging or burning. The thick soleplate ensures even heat distribution for a professional finish.

✅ ADJUSTABLE TEMPERATURE, VARIABLE STEAM CONTROL – Lightweight steam irons feature a customizable thermostat dial to suit fabrics like cotton, silk, linen, wool, and synthetics. Choose from continuous steam (30g/min) or steam burst (0.9g/min) for stubborn creases.

✅ LARGE 480ML WATER TANK, POWERFUL STEAM OUTPUT – Equipped with a 480ml water tank, this steam iron ensures long ironing sessions. Delivers a continuous steam flow of 30g/min and a steam boost of 0.9g/min, effectively removing stubborn creases for crisp, professional results.

✅ SAFETY & SELF-CLEANING FUNCTION – The heat-resistant, shockproof ergonomic handle ensures a secure grip, making ironing comfortable and safe. The built-in self-cleaning function helps prevent limescale buildup, maintaining optimal performance and extending the iron’s lifespan.
description: Product Description POWERFUL STEAM BOOST One notable benefit of this steam iron is its capability to effectively iron fabrics in an upright position. ADJUSTABLE TEMPERATURE Achieve perfect ironing in various fabrics like wool, silk, linen, cotton, and more. CERAMIC COATED SOLEPLATE The ceramic soleplate gives a gentle and effortless glide, making ironing a breeze. Say goodbye to concerns about stains or burning. 480ML WATER TANK CAPACITY The generous water tank capacity allows you to iron a substantial amount of clothing without frequent refilling.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Anti- Drip & Calc Function, Continuous Steam Technology, Spray & Steam Burst Setting, Steam Boost Function, Vertical Steaming
